summary: Roster UI Refinements - All 15 UI tests PASSED. Features verified: 4-line athlete row layout, shortened warning labels, stronger momentum colors (green/amber/red), mini pipeline with 7 stages, bulk actions with checkboxes and sticky action bar, AI Roster Insights panel with 4 computed insights.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - clean component structure with MiniPipeline, MomentumLabel, AthleteRow, BulkActionBar, RosterInsights
Warning shortener logic in WARNING_MAP works correctly - transforms long warning texts to short labels (Inactive, Missing Docs, No Owner, etc.)
Mini pipeline correctly shows 7 stages with active stage wider (w-5 vs w-2.5) and labeled above
Bulk action bar is sticky (sticky top-0 z-30) and shows toast 'coming soon' - expected behavior per agent notes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roster UI refinements fully verified. Features working: (1) AI Roster Insights showing 4 insights - 6 strong interest, 6 declining momentum, 1 missing docs, 3 no ownership. (2) 4-line athlete row layout - Name, Position/GradYear, Momentum|Pipeline, Coach/Activity. (3) Mini pipeline shows 7 stage dots with current stage larger. (4) Momentum labels - Strong (green/emerald), Stable (amber), Declining (red). Distribution: Strong=13, Stable=6, Declining=6. (5) Shortened warning labels working - Inactive, Missing Docs, No Owner, At Risk, Follow-Up visible. (6) Risk border highlights - red for critical, amber for warning. (7) Bulk actions with checkboxes - bar shows 'X selected', has Assign Coach/Send Reminder/Add Note buttons (shows 'coming soon' toast). (8) View tabs (Team/Coach/Age) all working. (9) Search filters athletes correctly. (10) Hover reveals Open, Assign, Notes quick actions.

ai_roster_insights.details: Panel shows 4 computed insights: 6 athletes with strong recruiting interest, 6 risk losing momentum, 1 missing required documents, 3 without coach ownership

4_line_athlete_layout.details: Row displays Name (line 1), Position · GradYear (line 2), Momentum | Pipeline (line 3), Coach · Last activity (line 4)

mini_pipeline.details: 7 stage dots (Prospect, Contacted, Responded, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed). Active stage is wider (w-5 vs w-2.5) with label above

momentum_colors.details: Strong: emerald/green, Stable: amber/yellow, Declining: red. All colors verified in CSS

shortened_warning_labels.details: Found labels: Inactive, Missing Docs, No Owner, At Risk, Follow-Up. 12 athletes have warnings displayed

risk_border_highlight.details: Athletes with risk have left border - border-l-amber-400 for warning, border-l-red-400 for critical

bulk_actions.details: Checkboxes on each row, sticky action bar appears on selection with count. Buttons: Assign Coach, Send Reminder, Add Note. Shows 'coming soon' toast as expected

bulk_clear.details: X button clears selection and hides bulk action bar

view_tabs.details: Team View (3 groups), Coach View (7 groups), Age Group (3 groups) all switch correctly

search_filter.details: Typing 'Marcus' filters to 1 athlete. Clearing shows all 25

hover_quick_actions.details: Hover on athlete row shows Open, Assign, Notes buttons
